summary: Analysis of the Colonial legacy effects reveals significant variation across countries and regions. persistence of institutions, settler mortality thesis. Research shows correlations with economic development, institutional quality, and political stability.
key_points: Analytical framework for understanding Colonial legacy effects
sources: Kaufmann, Kraay, Mastruzzi (2010) WGI Methodology Paper
Freedom House Freedom in the World
philosophy_guard: PASS - Describes what IS: measurable governance indicators and empirical patterns. No normative claims about what OUGHT to be.
